job.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
job.summary: Senior frontend role on the product team. Ship features end-to-end across the dashboard and design system. Own performance work and mentor mid-level engineers.

candidate_chunks.content: 8 years building React applications, including a year as feature lead at Katana MRP
Senior Frontend Engineer at Katana MRP — Led migration from Webpack to Vite, cutting build times 60% and CI minutes 40%
Planned and shipped a 170-ticket ingredient booking feature as feature lead, including Miro architecture diagrams and weekly cross-team syncs
TypeScript, React, Vite, TanStack Query, Tailwind, Playwright
Contributed to Katana's cross-product design system, owning the form component library

top_chunks.content: 8 years building React applications, including a year as feature lead at Katana MRP
TypeScript, React, Vite, TanStack Query, Tailwind, Playwright
